ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Regarding Appointment Of A Personal Representative For The Estate Of Post-Deceased Heir Mary Eileen Mcdermott Condon
Off Calendar Feb-24-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brianna Mannion, Esq., counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator (appearing by video conference).

The Court notes review of the Petition and the somewhat unusual nature of the requested relief. Ms. Mannion acknowledges that the request to distribute estate proceeds to a post-deceased heir without personal representation in a Probate estate is unusual but advises the Court of the significant tax consequence that would be occasioned by delay and reminds the Court of the history of the matter, that the Public Administrator acted diligently in pursuing the matter, and that delay was only occasioned by the dictates of the pandemic.
After further discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission, advising Ms. Mannion that a revised Order should be filed by year-end and will include a hearing date for report on the status of the post-deceased heir's estate in San Diego.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (101 Coleridge Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion for Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,305,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 25, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
